description: List of accounts and calculations in a disorderly format, based on the paleography, likely from the 18th or 19th centuries. There are names here that may help provide a clearer dating estimate with future research: Eliyyahu Ṣahal, Mūsa __fera[?], Yosef Levi (recto). Curiously, about three quarters down the recto, there is an extremely well-rendered sin/ש (it is even dotted as such). If this letter ש was not handwritten then it may have resulted from someone testing a stamp from a mechanical typewriter or perhaps a single letter block from a printing press. Date: 18th or 19th c. MCD.
description_he: רשימת חשבונות וחישובים בפורמט לא מסודר. תאריך: המאה ה-18 או ה-19. בין השמות: אליהו צהל, מוסא __פרה[?], יוסף לוי. בולט שין/ש מעוצב היטב. MCD.
